item.title: Mexican Memes for my fellow weekend mexicans
item.description:
Happy weekend. Here are memes for us mexicans, chicanos, chikonkees, gringos, and everyone else. Everyone can play along, the more the merrier.
I got el Covid so I have some days off to post memes. Currently I'm a very frozen hispanic.
All cholos welcome
I swear to god I saw my uncle do this at a party once
Horchata is kinda gross
Pt. 1
Pt. 2
The meme so nice I (accidentally) put it in twice
I'd eat it if it was non vegetarian beans with lard. And maybe some cheese
This was our high school drunk snack, but with not gross beans
Hard if taco bell, soft if homemade. Fight me.
Que lastima
Straight to jail
My family never made birria stuff, but I had some the other day and it was greasy goodness
Yum
My aunt was the queen of the chankla
I miss my Homies collection
this and heavy breathing
Infinity chankla. El Thanos es mal
OC. Years ago I met el Charmander in Denver. What a time to be alive
The bebe es hongry
Mexican, not mexican't
Pullin for all of ya. Stay well
item.dc:creator: JoetheGeologist

item.title: Art Crawl. Junior artist featured.
item.description: Not my artwork, but amazing! I only point out that she is a junior artist because more mature artists have had more time and experience to create great works. Most viral edit: if you can afford it, make a donation to your local pet shelter. If you don't have the ability, donate your time on a day off.
item.dc:creator: Mightynineftw2000

item.title: My favourite snack
item.dc:creator: susanaTerror

item.title: Incredible Character.
item.description:
I have to rant, as a 33 year old married father of five I can honestly say I've never relate to a character as strongly as Luisa from Encanto. Jessica Darrow absolutely kills this song written by Lin-Manuel. She's the "tough one" of the family and because of her incredible strength (physically, psychologically, and emotionally) the entire family/town leans on her for support.
Despite her massive build she moves gracefully and beautifully. Rumor has it that the animators had to fight with Disney in order to depict her this large. I think they nailed it!
It's incredibly refreshing to see people judged on their own worth and merit! She is strong physically, psychological, and emotionally. She is her own self, a rock to lean on, and at no point is her traits compared to that of a man for judgment or validation. I freaking love the message that she's strong, reliable, and vulnerable without relating it to what gender should have those traits.
and then there's this part... still strong, but worried for the family. Reliable, but stressed. Powerful but vulnerable. It was therapeutic to see this portrayal of strength. I think we all need to help take care of the strong people in our lives. They may take on more but they all still have a breaking point. Most Viral Edit: Thanks guys! This was supposed to have a lot more description but imgur went over capacity as I was typing it out. I tried to go back and re type my message but it's still acting weird. You guys basically nailed it in the comments though. Shameless plug: Check out my survival, homesteading, and wood working channel!!https://www.youtube.com/c/FollowTheCompassNorth
item.dc:creator: LiberalViking
